title: phyllitis delavayi
intro: Phyllitis delavayi, also known as Chinese Leptodon, is a type of fern native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as possessing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Phyllitis delavayi are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
